# Validation

| Purpose | Command |
|---|---|
| test | `pytest` |
| build | `python -m build if configured; otherwise inspect manually` |
| lint | `ruff check . if configured; otherwise inspect manually` |
| typecheck | `not detected` |
| dev | `not detected` |
| deploy | `not detected` |
| debug | `not detected` |
| migrate | `not detected` |
| seed | `not detected` |
| docs | `not detected` |
| audit | `not detected` |
| doctor | `not detected` |

If a command is not detected, inspect the project before claiming validation passed.
